Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The GreenZone
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals and shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, and an optional overlay. Use /greenzone to open the window.
Changelog:
FC chest Tab 1 sync fix:
- Syncs Tab 1 after the FC chest opens when Tab 1 actual inventory data is loaded.
- Keeps the unsafe blind Tab 1 guess disabled so weak reads do not publish false tab data.
